'''Libreck''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]-dominated [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] named [[Hanoon]]. The city was constructed<ref name="SW:GB" /> by [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> and consisted of a [[Command center]] and [[prefab shelter]]s, it was the site of an Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and two [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]]. [[Excellency]] [[Lathe Parthenian]], one of the leaders of the [[Hanoon Imperial Resistance]], was held in the prison. By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the city had collected one of the shards of the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], an ancient [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]]. The future founder of the [[New Jedi Order]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and his sister [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] [[Battle of Hanoon|ventured]] to Hanoon to retrieve the shards of the Vor'Na'Tu, leading a small [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Army/Legends|army]]. They made their way to Libreck, and the town agreed to give up their shard if the Republic forces freed Parthenian and removed the Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The Republic forces skirmished with the garrison and freed Excellency Parthenian.<ref name="SW:GB" />

Libreck then gratefully gave up their shard and members of the Resistance joined with the Republic forces to continue their mission. Later, Organa and Skywalker decided to free the rest of the asteroid and took control of the [[Terraform Processor]]. With the demise of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]], Hanoon agreed to join the New Republic.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Libreck was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during a [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign mission, and the player must free the town as part of the mission. The mission and thus Libreck was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
